headline: CSX or GE Vernova? Wall Street Has Already Picked Its Earnings Winner
summary: Two industrial giants report Q2 results on the same day, and analysts are anything but neutral between them. Before you decide which earnings announcement to watch on July 22, you need to see how these two stack up across every dimension Wall Street actually measures.

headline: CSX (CSX) Reports Q2: Everything You Need To Know Ahead Of Earnings
summary: Freight rail services provider CSX (NASDAQ:CSX) will be announcing earnings results this Wednesday after market hours. Here’s what to expect.
